email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Sales assistant bij Page Personnel. Uw omschrijving van een internationale, technische nichemarkt spreekt mij aan, en ik ben ervan overtuigd dat mijn ervaring in digitale marketing en technische ondersteuning een goede match is.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ondersteun ik het salesteam met SEO, contentcreatie en WordPress-beheer. Ik ben gewend om gestructureerd te werken, deadlines te bewaken en dossiers administratief op te volgen. Mijn technische achtergrond (front-end development, webdesign) en sterke interesse in techniek sluiten aan bij het profiel. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen).

Ik ben leergierig, hands-on en gemotiveerd om door te groeien in sales. Ik hoop mijn motivatie en vaardigheden in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales assistant position at Page Personnel. Your description of an international, technical niche market appeals to me, and I am convinced that my experience in digital marketing and technical support is a good match.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I support the sales team with SEO, content creation, and WordPress management. I am used to working in a structured way, meeting deadlines, and handling administrative follow-up. My technical background (front-end development, web design) and strong interest in technology fit the profile. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons).

I am eager to learn, hands-on, and motivated to grow in sales. I hope to further explain my motivation and skills in an interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Sales assistant bij Page Personnel. Uw omschrijving van een internationale speler in een technische nichemarkt sluit naadloos aan bij mijn interesses en ervaring.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ondersteun ik het salesteam met on-page SEO, keyword-gerichte content en WordPress-beheer. Ik beheer leads, volg dossiers administratief op en zorg dat deadlines worden gehaald. Mijn technische achtergrond als front-end developer (AngularJS, JavaScript) en mijn ervaring met webdesign (WordPress, Elementor) geven mij een sterk technisch inzicht, wat essentieel is voor deze functie.

Daarnaast heb ik via mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerd data, technische SEO-audits en het optimaliseren van zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-gestuurde zoekmachines. Deze vaardigheden zijn direct toepasbaar bij het opmaken van specificatiebladen en het ondersteunen van offertes.

Ik ben communicatief, klantgericht en werk gestructureerd. Mijn hands-on mentaliteit en leergierigheid zorgen ervoor dat ik snel nieuwe systemen eigen maak. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik ben gemotiveerd om door te groeien in sales en kijk ernaar uit om mijn vaardigheden in te zetten voor uw organisatie.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een persoonlijk gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Sales assistant position at Page Personnel. Your description of an international player in a technical niche market aligns perfectly with my interests and experience.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I support the sales team with on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and WordPress management. I manage leads, handle administrative follow-up of dossiers, and ensure deadlines are met. My technical background as a front-end developer (AngularJS, JavaScript) and my experience with web design (WordPress, Elementor) give me strong technical insight, which is essential for this role.

Additionally, through my own project mirook.com, I have gained experience with structured data, technical SEO audits, and optimizing visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. These skills are directly applicable to preparing specification sheets and supporting quotations.

I am communicative, client-oriented, and work in a structured way. My hands-on mentality and eagerness to learn ensure I quickly master new systems. I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I am motivated to grow in sales and look forward to contributing to your organization.

I hope to further explain my motivation in a personal interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Ondersteuning van salesteam met SEO, content en WordPress-beheer (Episto)
Technische achtergrond: front-end development (AngularJS, JavaScript) en webdesign
Ervaring met administratieve opvolging van dossiers en deadlinebewaking
Sterke interesse in techniek en sales, hands-on mentaliteit
Vloeiend Engels en Turks, Nederlands B1 (in opleiding)
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I support the sales team with on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable with administrative follow-up, lead management, and deadline tracking. Quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into sales support and campaign coordination. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

## Core skills
- Sales support & administration: lead follow-up, dossier management, deadline tracking, ERP system management (familiar with structured data workflows)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Support the sales team with on-page SEO, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions
- Manage leads and follow up on administrative aspects of sales dossiers

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
